ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the country (e.g., Asia-Pacific, Europe) */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* Two-letter ISO code for the country */,
  "iso_code_3" TEXT /* Three-letter ISO code for the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent (e.g., Asia, Europe, Africa) */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "population_density_per_sq_km" REAL /* Population density per square kilometer */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "economic_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic data record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the countries table */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the economic data is recorded */,
  "tariff_rate" REAL /* Tariff rate as a percentage */,
  "income_tax_rate" REAL /* Income tax rate as a percentage */,
  "corporate_tax_rate" REAL /* Corporate tax rate as a percentage */,
  "tax_burden_gdp" REAL /* Tax burden as a percentage of GDP */,
  "gov_expenditure_gdp" REAL /* Government expenditure as a percentage of GDP */,
  "population_millions" REAL /* Population in millions */,
  "gdp_billions_ppp" REAL /* GDP in billions (PPP) */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate as a percentage */,
  "five_year_gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* 5-year GDP growth rate as a percentage */,
  "gdp_per_capita_ppp" REAL /* GDP per capita (PPP) */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate as a percentage */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate as a percentage */,
  "fdi_inflow_millions" REAL /* FDI inflow in millions */,
  "public_debt_gdp" REAL /* Public debt as a percentage of GDP */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economic_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "data_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "economic_data_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the economic_data table */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the economic data */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made to the economic data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "data_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "economic_data_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the economic_data table */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_access_id")
)
